story.iWant: MailService ve SMSService'te retry mekanizmasını Common RetryService ile entegre etmek
story.soThat: email ve SMS gönderimlerinde geçici network hataları otomatik retry edilsin ve kritik iletişimlerin güvenilirliği artsın
story.tasks: - Task 1: MailService Dependencies Update (AC: 6.5.5.1) - Subtask 1.1: Constructor'a RetryService inject et - Subtask 1.2: Import statement ekle - Subtask 1.3: Private readonly property - Subtask 1.4: ConfigService'den config değerlerini al - Task 2: Environment Configuration (AC: 6.5.5.9) - Task 3: MailService Send Retry Integration (AC: 6.5.5.2) - Task 4: Template Email Retry Integration (AC: 6.5.5.3) - Task 5: SMSService Dependencies Update (AC: 6.5.5.4) - Task 6: SMSService Send Retry Integration (AC: 6.5.5.5) - Task 7: SMS Retry Method Refactoring (AC: 6.5.5.6) - REFACTOR existing retrySms() - Task 8: Error Classification and Handling - MailService (AC: 6.5.5.7) - Task 9: Error Classification and Handling - SMSService (AC: 6.5.5.8) - Task 10: Logging Integration - MailService (AC: 6.5.5.10) - Task 11: Logging Integration - SMSService (AC: 6.5.5.11) - Task 12: Unit Tests - MailService (AC: 6.5.5.12) - Task 13: Unit Tests - SMSService (AC: 6.5.5.13) - Task 14: Integration Tests (Optional) (AC: 6.5.5.14)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
AC-6.5.5.1: MailService Dependencies Update - src/modules/mail/services/mail.service.ts güncellendi - Constructor'da RetryService inject edilmiş - RetryService import edilmiş: src/common/services/retry.service.ts
AC-6.5.5.2: MailService Send Retry Integration - sendEmail() method RetryService ile wrap edilmiş - emailProvider.send() çağrısı retry ile sarmalanmış - Max attempts: 5 (configurable) - Base delay: 2000ms (configurable) - Context string: "Email Send: ${to} - ${subject}"
AC-6.5.5.3: Template Email Retry Integration - sendTemplateEmail() method RetryService ile wrap edilmiş - Template rendering + email send birlikte retry edilir - Max attempts: 5, base delay: 2000ms - Context: "Template Email: ${templateName} to ${to}"
AC-6.5.5.4: SMSService Dependencies Update - src/modules/sms/services/sms.service.ts güncellendi - Constructor'da RetryService inject edilmiş - ConfigService inject edilmiş (yeni dependency)
AC-6.5.5.5: SMSService Send Retry Integration - sendSms() method RetryService ile wrap edilmiş - fonivaService.sendSms() çağrısı retry ile sarmalanmış - Max attempts: 5, base delay: 2000ms - Context: "SMS Send: ${phoneNumber} - ${message.substring(0, 50)}..."
AC-6.5.5.6: SMS Retry Method Refactoring - EXISTING retrySms() method REFACTORED to use RetryService - Remove manual exponential backoff logic (backoffDelays array) - Remove manual setTimeout() delay logic - Preserve existing attemptCount tracking - Keep existing database update logic (status, providerId, errorMessage)
AC-6.5.5.7: Error Handling - MailService - Network timeout errors: Retry (RetryService handles) - SendGrid rate limit (429): Retry - Invalid email (400): Don't retry, throw BadRequestException immediately - Retry exhausted: Wrap with i18n-based BadRequestException - Preserve existing i18n error messages: errors.EMAIL_SEND_FAILED
AC-6.5.5.8: Error Handling - SMSService - Network timeout errors: Retry - Foniva API errors (5xx): Retry - Invalid phone number (400): Don't retry, update status to FAILED immediately - Retry exhausted: Update status to FAILED - Preserve existing i18n error messages
AC-6.5.5.9: Environment Configuration - .env.example updated with MAIL_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS=5, MAIL_RETRY_BASE_DELAY=2000 - .env.example updated with SMS_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS=5, SMS_RETRY_BASE_DELAY=2000
AC-6.5.5.10-11: Logging - Preserve existing debug and error logs in both services - RetryService provides automatic retry logging with context strings
AC-6.5.5.12-13: Unit Tests - MailService tests: 6 test scenarios with RetryService mocks - SMSService tests: 6 test scenarios with RetryService, FonivaService, PrismaService mocks

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Common Cache & Retry Services
doc.section: Story 6.5-5: Mail & SMS Services Retry Integration
doc.snippet: Integrate RetryService into MailService and SMSService for automatic retry on transient failures. Max attempts: 5 (critical communication), base delay: 2000ms. Error classification: 4xx errors skip retry, 5xx and network errors retry.

doc.title: Epic 6.5: Common Cache & Retry Services
doc.section: Story 6.5-5: Mail & SMS Services Retry Integration
doc.snippet: Wrap SendGrid send and Foniva send operations with retry. Template email retry includes rendering + send. SMS retrySms() method refactored to use RetryService instead of manual backoff.

doc.title: Previous Story: S3 Service Retry Integration
doc.snippet: RetryService usage pattern: executeWithRetry() with maxAttempts, baseDelay, context. Exponential backoff formula: 2^(attempt-1) * baseDelay. Error classification: 4xx errors skip retry. Configuration via environment variables with ConfigService defaults.

artifact.reason: Core retry service - provides executeWithRetry() method with exponential backoff. Already implemented in Story 6.5-2. Inject via constructor and wrap email/SMS operations.
Target service for retry integration. Contains sendEmail() and sendTemplateEmail() methods that need RetryService wrapping. Already has I18nService integration.
Target service for retry integration. Contains sendSms() method and EXISTING retrySms() method (lines 154-231) with manual backoff that needs REFACTORING to use RetryService.
Email provider interface - send() method is what MailService wraps with retry. Returns EmailResult with messageId and success status.
SMS provider service - sendSms() method is what SMSService wraps with retry. External HTTP API call to Foniva.
Template rendering service - render() method used in sendTemplateEmail(). Template rendering + email send wrapped together in retry.

node.dependency: Used by Foniva service for HTTP calls

story-context.constraints:
**Critical Integration Requirements:** 1. RetryService MUST be injected via constructor dependency injection 2. ConfigService MUST be used for retry configuration (maxAttempts, baseDelay) 3. PRESERVE existing I18nService integration and error messages 4. PRESERVE existing database tracking logic in SMSService (status, attemptCount, errorMessage)
**Error Classification (MANDATORY):** 1. 4xx client errors (invalid email, invalid phone): NO RETRY - throw/update status immediately 2. 5xx server errors: RETRY via RetryService 3. Network timeout errors: RETRY via RetryService 4. Rate limit errors (429): RETRY via RetryService
**Code Refactoring Requirements:** 1. SMSService.retrySms() method: REMOVE manual exponential backoff logic - Remove: backoffDelays array [60, 300, 900] - Remove: manual setTimeout() delay logic (lines 184 in current code) - Replace: with RetryService.executeWithRetry() - Preserve: attemptCount tracking and database updates
**Logging Requirements:** 1. PRESERVE all existing debug and error logs 2. RetryService provides automatic logging with context strings 3. Context strings MUST be descriptive: "Email Send: ${to} - ${subject}"
**Import Organization (8-group pattern):** Libraries → DTOs → Services → Repositories → Entities → Interfaces → Enums → Events

tests.standards:
Testing Framework: Jest (v30.0.0) Pattern: Arrange-Act-Assert Coverage Target: >80%
Unit Testing Standards: - Mock all external dependencies (RetryService, emailProvider, fonivaService, PrismaService, I18nService) - Test success scenarios (first attempt, retry success) - Test failure scenarios (network errors, retry exhaustion) - Test error classification (4xx no retry, 5xx retry) - Verify retry calls with correct parameters - Verify logging calls
Integration Testing Standards (Optional): - End-to-end flows with real RetryService - Transient failure simulation - Retry integration verification
tests.locations:
Unit Tests: - src/modules/mail/services/__tests__/mail.service.spec.ts (create or update) - src/modules/sms/services/__tests__/sms.service.spec.ts (create or update)
Integration Tests (Optional): - test/mail-sms.integration-spec.ts (create if needed)
Test File Pattern: *.spec.ts for unit tests, *.integration-spec.ts for integration tests
tests.ideas:
**MailService Unit Tests:** 1. AC-6.5.5.2: sendEmail successful on first attempt 2. AC-6.5.5.2: sendEmail retry on network error (TimeoutError) 3. AC-6.5.5.7: sendEmail no retry for invalid email (400 error) 4. AC-6.5.5.7: sendEmail retry exhaustion - throw BadRequestException 5. AC-6.5.5.3: sendTemplateEmail retry on rendering + send 6. AC-6.5.5.3: sendTemplateEmail retry exhaustion
**SMSService Unit Tests:** 1. AC-6.5.5.5: sendSms successful on first attempt 2. AC-6.5.5.5: sendSms retry on network error 3. AC-6.5.5.8: sendSms no retry for invalid phone number (400 error) 4. AC-6.5.5.8: sendSms retry exhaustion - status: FAILED 5. AC-6.5.5.6: retrySms() successful retry with RetryService 6. AC-6.5.5.6: retrySms() retry exhaustion
**Integration Tests (Optional):** 1. AC-6.5.5.14: Email send with retry on transient failure (end-to-end) 2. AC-6.5.5.14: SMS send with retry on transient failure (end-to-end) 3. AC-6.5.5.14: Template email send with retry (end-to-end) 4. AC-6.5.5.14: Retry integration with real RetryService
**Mock Strategies:** - RetryService mock: executeWithRetry() with success, retry, exhaustion scenarios - emailProvider mock: send() with EmailResult, network errors, 400 errors - fonivaService mock: sendSms() with providerId, network errors, 400 errors - PrismaService mock: SMS.create(), SMS.update(), SMS.findUnique() - I18nService mock: t() method for i18n error messages
